results.title: OPINION: Fix the process, not the energy mix
results.description: America's energy permitting crisis has a number: 29 years. That's how long it takes, on average, to bring a mine online in the United States, longer than any country except Zambia, according to S&P Global.

results.title: Lynas Rare Earths Screens Cheap as Demand Firms: The Shift Few Are Watching
results.description: A rare earths producer trades below a common intrinsic-worth estimate as magnet-metal demand underpins forecast growth.

results.title: Accountant-general directed us to open dollar, pound accounts for fake agency – CBN
results.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) has revealed that it got instructions from the Office of the Accountant-General of the Federation (OAGF) to open two domiciliary accounts for the ‘phantom’ Presidential Foreign Investment Promotion Council (PFIPC). A director at the CBN, Hamisu Abdullahi, who represented the CBN Governor at the investigative hearing, disclosed this on [...] The post Accountant-general directed us to open dollar, pound accounts for fake agency – CBN appeared first on 21st CENTURY CHRONICLE .

results.title: Crude Oil Gains Nearly 1 Pc To Rs 8,014/barrel In Futures Trade
results.description: Analysts said crude prices gained after Iran carried out retaliatory attacks against US-linked military installations in Jordan and Bahrain following Washington's airstrikes,
